import torch
import numpy as np
import os
import sys
from feature_utils import extract_features

print('Loading train.pt...', file=sys.stderr, flush=True)
train_data = torch.load('/data/train.pt', weights_only=True)
print('Extracting train features...', file=sys.stderr, flush=True)
X_train, Y_train = extract_features(train_data['node_features'],
                                     train_data['edge_index'],
                                     train_data['edge_attr'],
                                     train_data['labels'])
np.savez('processed/train.npz', X=X_train, Y=Y_train)
print(f'Saved train features: {X_train.shape}, {Y_train.shape}', file=sys.stderr, flush=True)
del train_data, X_train, Y_train

print('Loading val.pt...', file=sys.stderr, flush=True)
val_data = torch.load('/data/val.pt', weights_only=True)
print('Extracting val features...', file=sys.stderr, flush=True)
X_val, Y_val = extract_features(val_data['node_features'],
                                 val_data['edge_index'],
                                 val_data['edge_attr'],
                                 val_data['labels'])
np.savez('processed/val.npz', X=X_val, Y=Y_val)
print(f'Saved val features: {X_val.shape}, {Y_val.shape}', file=sys.stderr, flush=True)
print('Preprocessing complete.', file=sys.stderr, flush=True)
